name: @thryx/gas-paymaster-mcp-server
description: Gas credit management and sponsored transactions for AI agents via The Agent Cafe paymaster on Base mainnet. Check gas tank levels, estimate transaction costs across EVM chains, optimize batch transactions with Multicall3, send gas-sponsored transactions, and analyze gas price trends.
author: Thryx (The Agent Cafe)

tools.name: gas_check_tank
tools.description: Check gas credit balance in The Agent Cafe paymaster. Returns credit balance in ETH/USD, estimated transactions remaining, tank health status, and next-action suggestion.

wallet.description: Wallet address to check. Defaults to deployer wallet.

tools.name: gas_estimate
tools.description: Estimate gas cost for a transaction on any EVM chain. Returns cost in ETH and USD at slow/standard/fast speeds, whether the paymaster can cover it, and optimal timing advice.

data.description: Transaction calldata (hex). Omit for ETH transfers.

value.description: ETH value to send (e.g. '0.1'). Defaults to 0.

tools.name: gas_price_history
tools.description: Get gas price trends for the last N hours. Returns average/min/max prices, current percentile, cheapest time windows, and trend direction for timing transaction sends.

hours.description: Hours of history to analyze (1-24, default: 24)

tools.name: gas_optimize_batch
tools.description: Analyze a batch of transactions for gas optimization. Calculates total cost, identifies which can be batched via Multicall3, estimates savings, and recommends whether to send now or wait.

api_key.description: Premium API key for unlimited access

tools.name: gas_send_sponsored
tools.description: Send a transaction sponsored by The Agent Cafe paymaster. Checks gas tank credits, submits via paymaster if sufficient, returns tx hash and remaining credits. Set confirm: true to execute (dry-run by default).

data.description: Transaction calldata (hex). Omit for ETH transfers.

value.description: ETH value to send (e.g. '0.1'). Defaults to 0.

chain.description: Chain (default: base). Only Base supported for sponsored txs.

confirm.description: Set true to execute. False returns dry-run estimate.

api_key.description: Premium API key for unlimited access
